string.text: "Bison's Group": Find the Missing Group
"Bison's Group": Examine the Body
Bison's group set out to find some miracle artifact. Why they needed it is unknown, but the one thing I know for sure is the starting point of the group, and that's where I’ll begin.
Bison is dead, I need to examine his body, maybe I will find something.
"Assault": Wait for Krasnopolski's Group
"Assault": Talk to Krasnopolski
"Assault": Eliminate the Enemy
"Assault": Talk to Krasnopolski
You need to wait for Krasnopolski’s group before attacking the Mercenaries' camp.
The group has arrived, it's time to talk to Krasnopolski before starting the assault.
The assault has begun, you need to eliminate the mercenaries.
The mercenaries are dead, you need to talk to Krasnopolski.
"Theft": Retrieve Your Belongings
The bandits took all my things, I need to get them back.
"Help": Respond to the Distress Signal
The leader of the neutrals asked me to check the distress signal, it’s located near the camp.
"Inhabitants": Reach the Stalker Camp
"Inhabitants": Talk to the Locals
The search should start at the local stalker camp. I'm sure the group was there, they couldn't have left empty-handed. I should ask the locals about the group.
The stalker at the camp entrance advised talking to the camp leader and the merchant. Since there are no other ideas for now, I should focus on this.
"Swamp Monster": Kill the Monster
"Swamp Monster": Return to Foma
The merchant asked me to deal with some swamp monster in exchange for information about the group.
The monster is dead, now I can return to the merchant for the information.
"Revenge": Find the Killer
"Revenge": Decide the Fate of Kosta
It seems a mercenary killed this stalker and took the artifact. I need to find this mercenary and try to uncover the reason.
The mercenary who killed the stalker is now feeding the worms, but there’s still one culprit left – Kosta. I should talk to Rzhavy about this.
"Hot on the Trail": Investigate the Tunnel
The merchant didn’t clarify the situation with the group much, but he pointed me to a local tunnel where Bison went after buying provisions. I should check it out.
"Catacombs": Learn More
"Catacombs": Wait for the Message
"Catacombs": Talk to Foma
"Catacombs": Find the Stash
"Catacombs": Find the Key
"Catacombs": Open the Door
"Catacombs": Descend into the Dungeon

In the tunnel, I found some traces of the group. They’ve been gone for over three days, but I also found Rezak’s PDA – he was one of Bison's group members. The PDA contains information about the catacombs. I need to learn more about them and where they lead.

Foma doesn’t know anything about the catacombs, but he mentioned an old man who could help. He doesn’t know where to find him, but the old man is a frequent visitor at the bar. Foma promised to send me a message when the old man shows up.
The merchant sent me a message that he has news. I should speak to him as soon as possible.
The old man who knew how to enter the catacombs is dead. The merchant has coordinates for a stash that might have something that will help me find the entrance to the catacombs.

In the old man’s stash, there weren’t many items. The most interesting find was an old manuscript. It mentions that one of the catacomb entrances is sealed, but there’s a second one. To access it, I need to find a key, which, according to the notes, is somewhere on the grounds where the entrance is located.
I have the key. I didn’t expect it to be a magnetic key card, but a key is a key, as long as it opens the door.
The doors are open, now I can descend into the catacombs following the group.
"Uninvited Guests": Reconnaissance
"Uninvited Guests": Climb Over the Fence
"Uninvited Guests": Eavesdrop on the Conversation
"Uninvited Guests": Return to Rzhavy
Rzhavy has a job for me: I need to find out why the mercenaries are in the area. I should scout the military base.
The door to the base is locked, and I don't have the key. I’ll have to find another way in. I think I can climb over the fence.
Eavesdrop on the mercenaries' conversation.
From the conversation, I learned that the mercenaries were hired to find an artifact, and they already have it. It also turns out that their leader is someone named Krivoy.
"An Outsider Among Friends": Wait for Night
"An Outsider Among Friends": Check the Mercenary Camp
"An Outsider Among Friends": Escape the Cell
I found information in the mercenary's PDA that the leader of the neutrals, Kosta, is somehow involved with the mercenaries. I should wait for nightfall to check the mercenary camp.
This is the right time. I think the mercenaries have already left the camp.
I need to find a way to escape the cell...
"Like a Resort": Find My Gear
"Like a Resort": Talk to Krasnopolsky
"Like a Resort": Retrieve My Gear
The mercenaries took all my gear, but I think it’s somewhere nearby.
The room is locked, and it seems that the lieutenant already has the key. I should talk to him.
I have the key to the leader’s room. Now I can open the door and get my stuff back.
"Herald of Justice": Talk to Rzhavy
"Herald of Justice": Wait for a Message
"Herald of Justice": Return to Rzhavy
"Herald of Justice": Interrogate Kosta
"Herald of Justice": Kill Kosta

My suspicions about the neutral leader, Kosta, have been confirmed. He was working with mercenaries, selling them artifacts, and based on recent information, he sent a stalker to his death with the "blues" (mercenaries).

I reported the information about the traitor leader to Rzhavy. He asked me to wait a couple of hours to inform the camp's inhabitants about everything. After that, he’ll contact me to discuss the next steps.
Rzhavy sent a message, I need to talk to him.
Before killing Kosta, it would be wise to interrogate him.
I've learned everything I needed, now it's time to kill him.
"Prisoner of Circumstances": Wait for Night
"Prisoner of Circumstances": Go on a Raid
"Prisoner of Circumstances": Clear the Camp
"Prisoner of Circumstances": Talk to the Prisoner
"Prisoner of Circumstances": Talk to Rzhavy
Before he died, Kosta revealed that Zhekan is still alive and is being held captive by bandits. Rzhavy wants to rescue him and offered me a chance to help. I need to wait for the night.
Night is the best time for a surprise attack. I should talk to Rzhavy.
Rescuing the prisoner quietly won’t work, so I’ll have to clear the entire bandit camp.
The bandits are dead, I should talk to the prisoner before returning to the camp.
The prisoner is freed, the bandits are dead, now I can discuss my reward with Rzhavy and return to the camp.
"Children of the Dungeons": Explore the Catacombs
"Children of the Dungeons": Escape the Catacombs
Based on the information I managed to dig up from the stalkers, the group went through these catacombs. But where do they lead? What’s going on inside? I need to be careful.

Skeletons, fresh corpses of stalkers, everything suggests the group never made it out of the catacombs. But among all the bodies, I didn’t find any from Bison’s group, nor was Bison himself there, so they must have made it out somehow. I need to move on and look for an exit.
"Crow": Unlock the PDA
"Crow": Wait for Unlocking
"Crow": Retrieve the PDA
In the catacombs, I found the body of Crow, who was part of Bison's group. I managed to recover his PDA, but it’s locked. I need to find a technician who can unlock it.
The PDA was handed over to the local technician, Pianist. He promised to unlock it, I just need to wait.
The technician informed me that the PDA is unlocked. It’s time to retrieve it.
"In the Footsteps": Find Information
"In the Footsteps": Talk to Garik
"In the Footsteps": Check the Lead
"In the Footsteps": Check the Shack
"In the Footsteps": Talk to Toha
The catacombs are behind me, I found Crow there, but the rest of the group apparently made it out, which is good news. That means I should look for them here.
Garik wants to talk about something. However, I first need to chat with the Trader.
A stalker from the camp reported that the group was seen near the Southeast homestead, moving towards the swamp. I should go check it out.
I found some sad information in Grek’s PDA. I hope my fears don’t turn out to be true...

I found a Merc’s body in a house in the swamp. The PDA contained information about his mission, which he apparently couldn’t complete. That means there’s still a chance that Bison is alive. I need to talk to the leader of the Neutrals, maybe they’ve seen mercenaries around here.
"Duty": Get in Touch
"Duty": Return to Toha

The leader of the Neutrals is willing to help eliminate people from the Syndicate. However, they’re concerned that if only stalkers participate in the assault, the Syndicate will send reinforcements to take revenge. Therefore, we need to contact Krasnopolsky and try to convince him to join the assault.
Krasnopolsky and his group are already on their way, but they won’t arrive until tomorrow midnight. Now I need to return to Toha and share the good news.
"Distress Signal": Check the Location
"Distress Signal": Kill the Controller
"Distress Signal": Talk to Garik
Garik asked for help in investigating the distress signal they picked up recently.
Kill the mutant.
The Controller is dead, as is the stalker who apparently sent the distress signal. It’s time to talk to Garik before heading back to the base.
"Safe Place": Reach a Safe Spot
My head is buzzing... My gear is gone. I need to get out of here and find a safer place.
"In Time of Need": Retrieve the Case from the Ravine
"In Time of Need": Deliver the Case to Garik

A stalker, in exchange for weapons, asked me to perform a task. To the northwest of the Stalker's camp, there’s a small ravine with anomalies, and in it, I need to retrieve a case and deliver it to the stalker.
The case is with me, everything went smoothly! Now I just need to deliver it to the owner.
"Lost": Find Out What Happened?
"Lost": Investigate the Area
"Lost": Eliminate the Monolith Squad
"Lost": Examine the Bodies
"Lost": Deliver the Found Documents
I heard on the radio that a stalker squad went missing. It’s worth offering help in the search.
Toha briefly explained the situation and pointed to the last communication point of the squad. I should check it out and see if I can find anything.
I ran into a Monolith squad during the investigation. They are probably responsible for the stalkers' disappearance. Time to act.
The Monolith squad is eliminated. Sadly, I couldn’t save the guys. That’s how Monolith operates—kill the unfaithful. I should examine the bodies of the guys.
I found some documents on the leader of the squad. I should take them to Toha.
"New Beginning": Explore the Zone
"New Beginning": Return to the Neutral Leader
The leader of the neutral camp marked a location for the artifact search. The area is filled with gravitational anomalies, so caution is advised.
The artifact has been found. It’s time to return to the neutral leader.
"New Beginning": Explore the Zone
"New Beginning": Return to the Neutral Leader
The leader of the neutral camp marked a location for the artifact search. The area is filled with electrical anomalies, so caution is advised.
The artifact has been found. It’s time to return to the neutral leader.
"New Beginning": Explore the Zone
"New Beginning": Return to the Neutral Leader
The leader of the neutral camp marked a location for the artifact search. The area is filled with acid anomalies, so caution is advised.
The artifact has been found. It’s time to return to the neutral leader.
"Scanning": Find the Lockpick
"Scanning": Install the Scanner
"Scanning": Return for the Reward
Ivanych asked to find the missing lockpick and later install the scanner in the anomaly.
The lockpick is dead, and the scanner is now with me. All that’s left is to install it and return to Ivanych.
The scanner has been successfully installed. Now it’s time to return for the reward.
"Trade Agreement": Give the Case
This case seems to be what Foma needs. I should give it to him.
"Hunting": Destroy the Mutants
"Hunting": Collect the Reward
Foma hired me for a hunt. I need to clear out four mutant camps, and he promised a good artifact as a reward.
The clean-up is done. Foma sent me the coordinates for the stash where my reward is hidden.
"Military Secret": Find the Military Maps
"Military Secret": Deliver the Maps to Zhekan.
Zhekan told me about a recent crash of a military helicopter in the area, but the exact location is unknown. My task is to find the helicopter and retrieve the military maps from it.
The maps have been found. Now I need to deliver them to Zhekan and collect my reward.
Eliminate the Bandits
Collect the Reward
Collect the reward for eliminating the bandits from the trader.
Eliminate the bandits at the Devil's Camp. This will help stop the robberies of stalkers returning to base with their loot.
"Cleanup": Meet the Squad
"Cleanup": Eliminate the Enemy
"Cleanup": Talk to Groz
"Cleanup": Collect the Reward
"Cleanup": Collect the Reward
The trader offered a job to clean up a bandit camp. Now I need to meet the squad.
The squad leader, Groz, didn't waste time and ordered the assault.
The bandits are eliminated. It's time to talk to Groz.
Collect the reward.
The bandits and the assault squad are dead, but the reward for the job is still waiting.
